_comment: Stream Catalog tags / business metadata to apply to topics and fields. Apply via Confluent Cloud UI (Stream Catalog) or the Catalog REST API. Tags drive RBAC, discoverability, and the data-classification story.

tags.name: agent-action
tags.description: Autonomous control actions and work orders (audited)

rbac_notes: Grant the agent service account READ on telemetry/incidents and WRITE on control/work_orders only. PII-tagged crew topic is restricted to dispatch roles. This least-privilege split is part of the governance story.
